content:
Let R=2008 and write a_n=√r_n.  One shows by induction that

 a_1=1,

 a_{n} = (√R·a_{n−1})/(√R−a_{n−1}).

Hence one finds in closed‐form

 a_n = √r_n = √R / (√R−(n−1)),

so

 r_n = R/(√R−(n−1))^2.

We need r_n to be finite and positive, i.e. √R−(n−1)>0 ⇒ n−1<√2008≈44.82 ⇒ n≤45.  At n=46 the denominator vanishes (and then becomes negative).  Thus the largest n for which the construction works is

\boxed{45}.
